privileged_info_summary: All three target products exist in the WooCommerce database as created by setup_woocommerce.sh: 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (price $24.99, SKU OCT-BLK-M), 'Merino Wool Sweater' (price $89.99, SKU MWS-GRY-L), and 'Slim Fit Denim Jeans' (price $59.99, SKU SFDJ-BLU-32). The task requires creating a category hierarchy with parent category 'Apparel' with description 'Clothing and fashion items', two child categories 'Tops' (description: 'T-shirts, sweaters, and upper body wear') and 'Bottoms' (description: 'Jeans, pants, and lower body wear'), and assigning the three products to their respective categories (T-shirt and Sweater to Tops, Jeans to Bottoms). All metadata specifications match the task requirements and product names from the environment setup.
